title: Metric Lookup UX — Display Associated Metrics on Reports and Dashboards
story: As a data analyst, I want to see which metrics are related to a report or dashboard in a new 'Metrics' tab, so that I can navigate from reports to their associated metrics.
description:
Adds a 'Metrics' tab to the Reports and Dashboards detail view that displays metrics associated with the selected report or dashboard. Uses the middleware from MBT-838 to fetch related metrics.

Clicking a metric in the list opens the metric detail sidebar. A bug where the previous metric selection persisted when switching reports/dashboards was identified and fixed — the selection is now cleared when the panel is closed.
acceptance_criteria: 'Metrics' tab appears after the Reports tab on the detail panel
Tab displays a list of associated metrics fetched from MBT-838 middleware
Clicking a metric opens the metric detail sidebar
Selection is cleared when the panel is closed to prevent stale data
ux_changes: New 'Metrics' tab on the report/dashboard detail panel. List of associated metrics with clickable names that open the metric sidebar.
middleware_changes: Integrates with the MBT-838 metric lookup endpoint to fetch associated metrics for a given report or dashboard ID.
implementation_notes: Required coordination between two developers — backend (MBT-838) and frontend (this ticket). Selection state must be cleared on panel close to avoid showing stale metric data.
comment_summary: Developer started work but needed clarification on the display approach. Three-way discussion held between both developers and product owner. Bug found where previous metric persisted after panel close — fixed by clearing selection on close.
